action_description: Factory tour form submitted, dealer contact form, financing form
notes: Highest intent group. Pushes contact directly to Lead Score 5 regardless of raw score threshold.

action_description: Incentive/promotion form, financial calculator, dealer visit tracking
notes: Includes year-end promotion forms and TC incentive forms.
Velocity tracking applies — frequency of configurator use is scored separately.

action_description: Website form submissions — brochure downloads, guides
notes: Organic brochure downloads are a critical signal — approximately 50% last-touch attribution. Velocity tracking applies.

action_description: Lifestyle guide downloads, newsletter signups, general page views
notes: Page views: 1pt each up to group cap.

action_description: Contact re-engages after 180+ days of inactivity
notes: Three priority tiers: Previous owner = +40pts; Previous high-stage prospect = +30pts; General re-engagement = +15pts. Triggered at 179-day conversion threshold.

action_description: Contact is a verified previous Airstream owner
notes: Applied on top of other scoring. Stacks with re-engagement boost.
